patch.value: Hands-on functional test pass 2026-05-29 (real data + Postgres)

Full functional + production-hardening test pass against an isolated throwaway Postgres and real pm workspaces. Verified build/typecheck/test, both launch paths (pm web extension + node dist/server.js), and the full HTTP API (auth, projects, item CRUD, deps, search, graph, stats) with persistence cross-checked via the pm CLI. Error cases return proper 4xx. Hardened DB-config startup UX.

Functional test pass complete. Build/typecheck/test green; both launch paths verified; full HTTP API exercised with persistence cross-checked via pm CLI; error cases return proper 4xx; DB-config startup UX hardened (2 issues found+fixed).
